creator: kaktus@FreeBSD.org
text: So, as we spoke yesterday, I'd like go wait for hselasky@'s comment's on the SYSINIT change for mallocinit.  If the mallocinit can't be changed back to SI_ORDER_FIRST, given that there isn't (too many) other cases like this, IMO we should consider changing sysctl_netisr_dispatch_policy().
